description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a predominantly rounded and slightly elongated form. Its surface is rough and uneven, featuring a mix of light gray, off-white, and subtle brownish hues, with some faint natural striations and weathering marks. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or openings, and its texture suggests it is composed of hard stone, likely granite or a similar material. One side displays a slightly flatter area, while the rest of the surface is more bulbous and curved. There are faint reddish-brown discolorations on one side, possibly from mineral deposits or environmental exposure. The overall appearance suggests it could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A medium-sized, rough, light gray rock with an irregular, rounded shape and subtle natural markings. Its surface is hard, weathered, and slightly mottled with faint brownish and reddish hues.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's broadest, most rounded face with a light gray, slightly mottled surface and subtle textural variations.
description_view_1: This side reveals a flatter area with visible reddish-brown discoloration and more pronounced surface weathering.
description_view_2: Here, the rock appears more angular, with a sharper edge and deeper surface creases, showing a transition from light to darker gray tones.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the rock's elongated curve and subtle striations, with a mostly pale gray surface and some faint dark lines.
attribute_location: urban park or landscaped sidewalk edge
